question: What is GBPIET?
answer: Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Engineering and Technology (GBPIET), Pauri Garhwal, Uttarakhand is an autonomous institute of Government of Uttarakhand. It was established in 1989 and started its first academic session in 1991-92. It is one of the premier technical institutes in Uttarakhand.

question: Where is GBPIET located?
answer: GBPIET is located in Pauri Garhwal, Uttarakhand - 246194.

question: What is the contact number of GBPIET?
answer: You can contact GBPIET at phone number 01368-228030 or email at director@gbpiet.ac.in. Website: https://gbpiet.ac.in

question: Who is the Director of GBPIET?
answer: The Director of GBPIET is Prof. (Dr.) V.K. Banga.

question: What undergraduate courses are offered at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers B.Tech in 8 disciplines including Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Applications, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biotechnology, and Applied Sciences and Humanities.

question: What postgraduate courses are offered at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET offers M.Tech programmes in different engineering fields and Master of Computer Applications (MCA).

question: Does GBPIET offer PhD programs?
answer: Yes, GBPIET provides facilities for research leading to the degree of Ph.D. in Engineering and Science in various disciplines.

question: What departments are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has the following departments: Applied Sciences and Humanities, Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Applications, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.

question: How to apply for admission at GBPIET?
answer: For admission details visit https://gbpiet.ac.in/admission/ on the official website. Admission is based on entrance exams. You can also visit the college office for more information.

question: How to pay college fees at GBPIET?
answer: College fees can be paid online at: https://onlinesbi.sbi.bank.in/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=823332. Hostel and Mess fees can be paid at: https://onlinesbi.sbi.bank.in/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=908435

question: What is the fee structure of GBPIET?
answer: For detailed fee structure please visit https://gbpiet.ac.in/fee-structure/ on the official GBPIET website.

question: Does GBPIET have hostel facility?
answer: Yes, GBPIET has separate hostel facilities available on campus for students. For hostel fee payment visit the official SBI collect portal.

question: What campus facilities are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET campus has: Central Library, Computer Centre, M.G. Auditorium, Hostels, Health Centre, Sports Complex, Bank and ATMs, Guest House, Transport Service, Post Office, Internet facility, Eateries, and Shopping Centre.

question: What is the placement record of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has excellent placement records. Top placements include: Kartikey Ranjan (ECE) at Amazon Web Services with 92 LPA, Vrinda Gupta (CSE) at Microsoft with 47 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, Microsoft, Cognizant, Capgemini, HCL, Accenture, BEL, BHEL, Axis Bank and many more.

question: What is the anti-ragging policy of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has strict anti-ragging measures. Anti-ragging helpline numbers are: 7017059887 and 8126565328. Institute Main Gate/Security Emergency Number: 8791884847.

question: How to login to GBPIET ERP portal?
answer: You can login to the GBPIET ERP portal at: https://gbpiet.sitslive.com/Login

question: What is the vision of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET's vision is to pivot for excellence in technical education and producing globally competent professionals by building a strong teaching-learning and research environment.

question: Does GBPIET have an IEEE Student Branch?
answer: Yes, GBPIET has an active IEEE Student Branch. Visit: https://edu.ieee.org/in-gbpiet/

question: What cultural events does GBPIET organize?
answer: GBPIET organizes various cultural and technical events including Goonj (annual cultural festival started in 1996), Hackathons, Design Skill Contests, and various inter-college tournaments.

question: Is GBPIET accredited?
answer: Yes, GBPIET has UGC Autonomy extended for five years from 2024-25 to 2028-29. It is also AICTE approved. For full accreditation details visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/accreditation-and-aicte-approvals/

question: How to check results at GBPIET?
answer: You can check your results at: https://gbpiet.ac.in/result/ on the official GBPIET website.

question: What are the social media handles of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET is active on: Twitter/X: @gbpietpauri, Instagram: @officialgbpietpauri, Facebook: search GBPIET on Facebook.

question: Does GBPIET have a placement cell?
answer: Yes, GBPIET has a Training and Placement Centre. For details visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/training-and-placement-centre/

question: What is the academic calendar of GBPIET?
answer: The academic calendar is available at: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-calendar/ on the official website.
